name: Banana Cream Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the milk in a heavy-bottomed pan until very hot but not boiling.
2. Mix the sugar, flour, and salt together in a bowl, stir in the hot milk, and beat until well blended. Pour back into the pan and continue stirring vigorously over low heat for 4-5 minutes, until very thick and smooth. Add the egg yolks and cook for a few more minutes.
3. Cool.
4. Mash the banana and beat it until smooth, add the lemon juice and stir the mixture into the cooled filling.
